ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #123456789 Shipped – Track Online
ham.body:
Hello John,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon. Your order #123456789 has been shipped.

Order Summary:
- Widget A x 2 – $19.98
- Gadget B x 1 – $9.99

Total: $29.97

Expected delivery: Tue, 12 Oct 2026, 10:00 AM – 2:00 PM

Track your shipment: <URL>

If you have any questions, contact our support team.

Thank you for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Verify Your Microsoft Teams Account
spam.body:
Dear John,

This is an urgent notification from the IT department. Your Microsoft Teams account requires immediate verification due to suspicious activity. Please join the following meeting to confirm your credentials and restore access.

Meeting ID: 123-456-789
Password: Secure123
Link: <URL>

Failure to attend may result in temporary suspension of your account.

Regards,
IT Support
